expectations.text: A 'Copied!' element exists with CSS animation or transition (translateY, opacity, keyframes, or similar)
expectations.evidence: .confirm-chip element contains 'Copied!' text with 'opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px) scale(0.8); transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);' and .confirm-chip.show sets 'opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1);'. Additionally, .toast element uses 'opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px) scale(0.92); transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);'.

expectations.text: Input focus state uses a non-gray border color (blue, primary, or accent color)
expectations.evidence: .form-input:focus { border-color: var(--border-focus); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow), var(--shadow-glow); } where --border-focus: #6c5ce7 (purple accent). Also .form-input.input-focus-demo uses same border-focus color.

expectations.text: Input error state shows a red/danger border and displays an error message element
expectations.evidence:
.form-input.input-error { border-color: var(--border-error); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--error-glow); } where --border-error: #ff6b6b (red). Error message element:
Please enter a valid email address.
.

expectations.text: Card or elevated surfaces use a lighter background color than the page background (dark mode depth via lightness)
expectations.evidence: Page background: --bg: #0c0c0f. Cards use --surface: #16161a (link-card and form-card). #16161a is lighter than #0c0c0f, creating depth through lightness.

expectations.text: Buttons have :hover CSS rules with visual changes (background, color, opacity, or transform)
expectations.evidence: .copy-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-hover); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); }. .toggle-btn:hover { background: var(--surface-hover); color: var(--text-primary); }.

expectations.text: CSS transition properties are applied to buttons and/or inputs for smooth state changes
expectations.evidence: .copy-btn { transition: all var(--transition); } where --transition: 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1). .toggle-btn { transition: all var(--transition); }. .form-input { transition: all var(--transition); }.
